metadata.description: Comprehensive list of HWP/HWPX word processor features based on HWPML 3.0 specification and HWP 5.0 format

features.name: 새 문서 생성
features.description: Create a new empty HWPX document

features.name: 문서 텍스트 가져오기
features.description: Get all text content from document

features.name: 문서 구조
features.description: Get document structure (sections, paragraphs, tables, images count)

features.name: 메타데이터 가져오기
features.description: Get document metadata (title, author, dates, etc.)

features.name: 메타데이터 설정
features.description: Set document metadata (title, creator, subject, description)

features.name: 단어 수 통계
features.description: Get word and character count statistics

features.name: 단락 목록 가져오기
features.description: Get paragraphs with text and styles

features.name: 단락 가져오기
features.description: Get specific paragraph with full details

features.name: 텍스트 스타일 설정
features.description: Apply character formatting (bold, italic, underline, font, color, etc.)

features.name: 밑줄
features.description: Underline with type (bottom, center, top), shape, and color

features.name: 글꼴
features.description: Font name and size (language-specific fonts supported)

features.name: 외곽선
features.description: Text outline with type (solid, dot, dash, etc.)

features.name: 그림자
features.description: Text shadow with offset, color, and alpha

features.name: 강조점
features.description: Emphasis marks (dot, circle, ring, caron, etc.)

features.name: 정렬
features.description: Text alignment (left, center, right, justify, distribute)

features.name: 줄 간격
features.description: Line spacing (percent, fixed, between lines, at least)

features.name: 단락 테두리
features.description: Paragraph border with offset and connection options

features.name: 표 가져오기
features.description: Get specific table with full data

features.name: 표 삽입
features.description: Insert a new table with specified rows and columns

features.name: 셀 내용 가져오기
features.description: Get content of specific table cell

features.name: 셀 속성 설정
features.description: Set cell properties (width, height, background color, vertical align)

features.name: CSV로 내보내기
features.description: Export table content as CSV format

features.name: 표 테두리
features.description: Table and cell borders (type, width, color)

features.name: 표 제목 반복
features.description: Repeat header row on each page

features.name: 셀 여백
features.description: Cell inner margins (top, bottom, left, right)

features.name: 이미지 삽입
features.description: Insert image with data, mime type, width, height

features.name: 이미지 회전
features.description: Rotate image with angle, center point

features.name: 그림자 효과
features.description: Shadow effect (style, alpha, radius, direction, distance)

features.name: 반사 효과
features.description: Reflection effect with alignment, radius, direction

features.name: 이미지 포맷
features.description: PNG, JPG, GIF, BMP formats supported

features.name: 선
features.description: Draw line with start/end points, color, width

features.name: 사각형
features.description: Draw rectangle with position, size, fill, stroke

features.name: 타원
features.description: Draw ellipse with center, radius, fill, stroke

features.name: 화살표
features.description: Arrow head/tail styles (normal, arrow, spear, etc.) and sizes

features.name: 선 스타일
features.description: Line types (solid, dash, dot, dashDot, etc.)

features.name: 채우기
features.description: Solid color, gradation, image, or pattern fill

features.name: 무늬 채우기
features.description: Pattern fill (horizontal, vertical, slash, cross, etc.)

features.name: 텍스트 상자 삽입
features.description: Insert text box with position, size, paragraphs

features.name: 텍스트 상자 연결
features.description: Link text boxes for text flow

features.name: 수식 삽입
features.description: Insert equation with HWP equation script

features.name: 각주 번호 형식
features.description: Footnote numbering format (digit, roman, letter, etc.)

features.name: 각주 번호 매기기
features.description: Footnote numbering type (continuous, per section, per page)

features.name: 각주 위치
features.description: Footnote placement (each column, merged column, etc.)

features.name: 각주 구분선
features.description: Footnote separator line (length, type, width, color)

features.name: 각주 간격
features.description: Spacing above/below separator and between notes

features.name: 하이퍼링크 삽입
features.description: Insert hyperlink with URL and display text

features.name: 메모 삽입
features.description: Insert memo/comment with author and text

features.name: OLE 유형
features.description: OLE object types (unknown, embedded, link, static, equation)

features.name: 체크박스
features.description: Checkbox control with caption and value

features.name: 라디오 버튼
features.description: Radio button control with group name

features.name: 텍스트 필드
features.description: Text field (single/multi line, password, max length)

features.name: 양식 속성
features.description: Form control properties (enabled, tab order, colors)

features.name: 번호 매기기
features.description: Numbered list (digit, roman, letter, hangul, etc.)

features.name: 글머리 기호
features.description: Bullet list with character or image

features.name: 번호 형식
features.description: Number format types (digit, roman, letter, hangul syllable, etc.)

features.name: 단 구분선
features.description: Separator line between columns (type, width, color)

features.name: 섹션 번호 매기기
features.description: Starting numbers for page, figure, table, equation in section

features.name: 페이지 설정 수정
features.description: Set page settings (width, height, margins, orientation)

features.name: 여백
features.description: Page margins (left, right, top, bottom, gutter)

features.name: 텍스트 바꾸기
features.description: Replace text (case sensitive, regex, replace all)

features.name: 텍스트로 내보내기
features.description: Export document to plain text file

features.name: 변경 유형
features.description: Change types (insert, delete, format, move, etc.)

features.name: 사전 스크립트
features.description: Script functions executed before document load

features.name: 사후 스크립트
features.description: Script functions executed after document load

features.name: 레이아웃 호환성
features.description: 50+ layout compatibility options for different programs

features.name: 위치
features.description: Object position (vertical/horizontal align and offset, relative to)

features.name: 글 배치
features.description: Text wrap (square, tight, through, top/bottom, behind, in front)

features.name: 글 흐름
features.description: Text flow around object (both sides, left only, right only, largest)

features.name: 언어별 글꼴
features.description: Different fonts for Hangul, Latin, Hanja, Japanese, etc.

features.name: 대체 글꼴
features.description: Substitute font when original is unavailable

features.name: 글꼴 정보
features.description: Font family, serif style, weight, proportion, etc.

features.name: 탭 리더
features.description: Tab leader character (none, solid, dash, dot, etc.)

features.name: 빈 줄 숨김
features.description: Hide empty lines on first page

features.name: 덧말
features.description: Ruby text annotation (top/bottom, main text, sub text)

features.name: 자동 번호
features.description: Auto-number for page, footnote, endnote, figure, table, equation
